mapper.select: SELECT * FROM live_class_session WHERE course_id = #{courseId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM live_class_session WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM live_class_session WHERE provider_room_name = #{providerRoomName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO live_class_session ( course_id, schedule_event_id, room_id, provider, provider_room_name, teacher_uid, student_uid, status, join_open_at, scheduled_start_at, scheduled_end_at, actual_start_at, actual_end_at, host_joined_at, peer_joined_at, ended_by_uid, end_reason, record_policy, ai_policy, extra_json, version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{scheduleEventId}, #{roomId}, #{provider}, #{providerRoomName}, #{teacherUid}, #{studentUid}, #{status}, #{joinOpenAt}, #{scheduledStartAt}, #{scheduledEndAt}, #{actualStartAt}, #{actualEndAt}, #{hostJoinedAt}, #{peerJoinedAt}, #{endedByUid}, #{endReason}, #{recordPolicy}, #{aiPolicy}, #{extraJson}, #{version}, NOW(3), NOW(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE live_class_session SET schedule_event_id = #{scheduleEventId}, room_id = #{roomId}, teacher_uid = #{teacherUid}, student_uid = #{studentUid}, join_open_at = #{joinOpenAt}, scheduled_start_at = #{scheduledStartAt}, scheduled_end_at = #{scheduledEndAt}, record_policy = #{recordPolicy}, ai_policy = #{aiPolicy}, update_time = NOW(3) WHERE course_id = #{courseId}

UPDATE live_class_session SET status = CASE WHEN actual_start_at IS NULL THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' ELSE status END, actual_start_at = CASE WHEN actual_start_at IS NULL THEN #{joinedAt} ELSE actual_start_at END, host_joined_at = CASE WHEN teacher_uid = #{uid} AND host_joined_at IS NULL THEN #{joinedAt} ELSE host_joined_at END, peer_joined_at = CASE WHEN student_uid = #{uid} AND peer_joined_at IS NULL THEN #{joinedAt} ELSE peer_joined_at END, update_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE live_class_session SET status = 'ENDED', actual_end_at = #{endedAt}, ended_by_uid = #{uid}, end_reason = #{endReason}, update_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
